#### Summary
 **[[Inverse folding]] models trained on all proteins (including proteins from mesophiles) generate sequences that are as [[Stability and thermostability|thermostable]] as those generated by models trained only on proteins from thermophiles** (Ertfelt et al 2024a[^ertfelt2024]; $n=1$ warning). However, the sequence composition of the designs changes. This was observed using a custom-trained version of [[ProteinMPNN]].

#### See also
* [[Thermophilic proteins have more aliphatic and charged residues on surface than mesophilic proteins]]

[^ertfelt2024]: Ertelt et al. (2024) "HyperMPNN – A general strategy to design thermostable proteins learned from hyperthermophiles." https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.11.26.625397
